productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Snova Glide 4M Black Sports Shoes
description: Get yourself an adidas Supernova Glide 4 M and sync your training goals with the absolute best in cushioning, stability and style. Pair this with miCoach compatibles and track your performance, while you enjoy those long, healthy runs in these comfy, durable trainers.UpperBlack mesh uppers provide maximum ventilationSynthetic black lace-ups for better FitIconic three stripes symbolising elegance and durability in silver on the sidesPadded collar and tongue, soft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole provide all day comfortDual-layer adiLITE/respoEVA sockliner promotes great step-in comfort and offers anti-microbial propertiesGEOFIT construction enhances comfortMidsoleFORMOTION midsole helps to stabilize the foot and provides exceptional ground adaptabilityShock-absorbing lightweight Phylon midsole for added comfortOutsoleRubber toe box and heel counter for added protectionDurable outsole with horizontal pattern provides high tractionadiPRENE+ delivers supreme forefoot cushioningadiPRENE offers under heel impact protectionTORSION system helps to retain mid foot integrityadiWEAR outsole supplies optimal durability in high-wear areasShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
